title: zornia peltata
intro: Zornia peltata is a perennial leguminous herb, also known as buffalo pea, that is native to the Americas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Zornia peltata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant is often prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and optimal preparation methods.
